exercises.title: Resource Estimator
exercises.description: Build a resource estimation tool for fault-tolerant quantum algorithms.
tasks: Input: logical qubits, T gates, target error rate

exercises.title: Modular Architecture Designer
exercises.description: Design a modular quantum computer architecture.
tasks: Plan routing for two-qubit logical gates
Compare monolithic vs modular resource costs
hints: Consider 2D mesh, torus, or hypercube topologies

exercises.title: Wiring Budget Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate wiring requirements and thermal load for a quantum system.
tasks: Input: number of qubits, lines per qubit
Calculate total wire count at each temperature stage
hints: Heat per line: ~10 nW at mixing chamber

exercises.title: Calibration Scheduler
exercises.description: Design an automated calibration system for large qubit arrays.
tasks: List parameters to calibrate per qubit
Estimate total calibration time for N qubits
hints: Some calibrations can run in parallel
